text: I feel a peculiar sense of displacement, as if the slanted lines and neon glow create an otherworldly portal separating myself from ordinary time. The obscured reflections and experimental displays around me invite curiosity and contemplation; I wonder about the blurry boundary between perception and reality. My mind is alert, yet softened by the abstract light and text, and I feel a quiet urge to reflect on how easily meaning shifts in unfamiliar spaces.
